titles.title: Let Me Introduce You to Jesus

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It looks like there’s pain in your eyes I can see tears, I would imagine a long road you’ve traveled Through the years… You must be hurting inside I know the struggle, What if I told you There’s someone who cares about Your trouble?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let me introduce you to Jesus! Let me introduce you to Him, He can take the rain away, Make the sun shine again Let me introduce you to Jesus! Let me introduce you to Him, I can’t wait for you to meet my wonderful friend

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Is there a problem that you’ve been facing, you can’t seem to solve it? Is your mind and your heart racing, and you can’t calm them? Is the weight of the World so heavy on your shoulders? I’ve got good news for you my friend, It’s not over!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: (But) Let me introduce you to Jesus! Let me introduce you to Him, He can take your frown away, make you smile again… So let me introduce you to Jesus! Let me introduce you to Him, I can’t wait for you to meet my Best Friend

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: If there’s a mountain in your way, He’ll help you climb it! And those stormy winds and rains, He can silence! You’ve tried everything that you know and done all that you can, Now here we are and it’s not by accident, Here is Jesus, here He is, what can I say? I fail to explain His greatness! Here is Jesus, here He is, I’ll step out of the way and let you talk to Him.
